name: romanzo-gabriele-neural
description: Root orchestration scripts for the Romanzo Gabriele neural graph stack.

scripts.docker:pull:dev: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f docker-compose.yml pull romanzo_gabriele_be romanzo_gabriele_fe romanzo_gabriele_mcp
